examples: Yuhyun presents Miri with a wonderful proposal of marriage.
The model of MIRI was established by ligating levo-anterior descending branch of coronary artery.
After she went to work and got married, she lived in places like Brunei, Miri, Sandakan and Sibu.
The hardware for Miri has been developed by institutes and companies from across Europe and America.
Miri has just gone through a rigorous mechanical and thermal test campaign at the Rutherford Appleton Laboratory (RAL) in Oxfordshire.
